title: HOMESHOPA Plastic Swing Top Waste Bin, 5Litre Rubbish Recycling Waste Paper Trash Can, Square Small Flip Top Lid Dustbin, Home Kitchen Household Bathroom Office Garbage Bin (Pink)
features: QUALITY MATERIAL: This classic swing top bin is made of strong plastic with a smooth, shiny finish and a swing top lid opening system for a convenient waste management solution everywhere. This flip top rubbish bin is great for use on desks, tabletops, kitchen worktops, countertops, and bathrooms; it can be used and positioned almost anywhere!

SIMPLE TO USE FUNCTIONALITY: The kitchen waste paper bin is meant to provide quick and easy access to disposing of your waste. This 5-liter plastic bin includes a swing top lid opening method, that allows you to place trash by pressing the swinging section with your hand. The lid is normally designed to conceal the bin's opening and keep odours and ugly contents hidden. The swing top mechanism allows for simple access to the trash can while securely closing the lid when not in use.

SPACE EFFICIENT SMALL SWING TOP BIN: This Recycling Trash Bin has been particularly made to take up as little area as possible while holding any minor rubbish you may place down or forget about. Because it is created in a square shape, it will fit precisely into corners or against any wall no matter where it is positioned. The swing top cover also keeps the contents of the bin out of sight and reduces the chance of odours escaping into the surrounding area.

KEEP YOUR SMALL AREAS CLUTTER FREE: With this 5L square kitchen dustbin, you can keep tables or other easily accessible space around the home, children's study room, or office clean and neat. Lightweight and practical trash can with a classic and versatile design, making it appropriate for moving and using anywhere and at any time.

COLOR OPTIONS: This flip top rubbish can is available in four distinct colours: black, white, cream, and grey. Each bin is h: 27m x w: 18.5cm x w: 18.5cm. Each waste paper bin has a maximum capacity of - 5 litres.
